revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-3-435

Alternative term: Electronic-Flash Lamp

A discharge lamp, operated with electronic equipment, giving a high light output for a very brief period, capable of repetition.

Reference: C.I.E. (modified)


Note: In lighthouse service, this type of lamp has been used for example for quick-flashing lights and in fog-detection apparatus.

{{IALAFooter}}
